heading: Bonneville Power Administration refinancing
label: 838l Bonneville Power Administration refinancing

children.text: “Administrator” means the Administrator of the Bonneville Power Administration;

children.label: A
children.text: is for a project, facility, or separable unit or feature of a project or facility;

children.label: B
children.text: is a cost for which the Administrator is required by law to establish rates to repay to the United States Treasury through the sale of electric power, transmission, or other services;

children.label: C
children.text: excludes a Federal irrigation investment; and

children.label: D
children.text: excludes an investment financed by the current revenues of the Administrator or by bonds issued and sold, or authorized to be issued and sold, by the Administrator under ;section 838k of this title
“new capital investment” means a capital investment for a project, facility, or separable unit or feature of a project or facility, placed in service after ;September 30, 1996

children.label: A
children.text: was incurred, but not repaid, before , andOctober 1, 1996

children.label: B
children.text: was for a project, facility, or separable unit or feature of a project or facility, placed in service before ;October 1, 1996
“repayment date” means the end of the period within which the Administrator’s rates are to assure the repayment of the principal amount of a capital investment; and

children.label: A
children.text: for an old capital investment, a rate determined by the Secretary of the Treasury, taking into consideration prevailing market yields, during the month preceding , on outstanding interest-bearing obligations of the United States with periods to maturity comparable to the period between , and the repayment date for the old capital investment; andOctober 1, 1996October 1, 1996

children.label: B
children.text: for a new capital investment, a rate determined by the Secretary of the Treasury, taking into consideration prevailing market yields, during the month preceding the beginning of the fiscal year in which the related project, facility, or separable unit or feature is placed in service, on outstanding interest-bearing obligations of the United States with periods to maturity comparable to the period between the beginning of the fiscal year and the repayment date for the new capital investment.

children.label: A
children.text: the present value of the old payment amounts for the old capital investment, calculated using a discount rate equal to the Treasury rate for the old capital investment; and

children.label: B
children.text: an amount equal to $100,000,000 multiplied by a fraction whose numerator is the principal amount of the old payment amounts for the old capital investment and whose denominator is the sum of the principal amounts of the old payment amounts for all old capital investments.

children.heading: Determination
children.label: 2 Determination
children.text: With the approval of the Secretary of the Treasury based solely on consistency with this section, the Administrator shall determine the new principal amounts under subsection (b) and the assignment of interest rates to the new principal amounts under subsection (c).

children.label: i
children.text: on the repayment date the Administrator assigned before , to the old capital investment, orOctober 1, 1994

children.label: ii
children.text: with respect to an old capital investment for which the Administrator has not assigned a repayment date before , on a repayment date the Administrator shall assign to the old capital investment in accordance with paragraph 10(d)(1) of the version of Department of Energy Order RA 6120.2 in effect on ; andOctober 1, 1994October 1, 1994

children.label: i
children.text: at the interest rate the Administrator assigned before , to the old capital investment, orOctober 1, 1994

children.label: ii
children.text: with respect to an old capital investment for which the Administrator has not assigned an interest rate before , at a rate determined by the Secretary of the Treasury, taking into consideration prevailing market yields, during the month preceding the beginning of the fiscal year in which the related project, facility, or separable unit or feature is placed in service, on outstanding interest-bearing obligations of the United States with periods to maturity comparable to the period between the beginning of the fiscal year and the repayment date for the old capital investment.October 1, 1994

children.heading: Interest rate for new principal amounts
children.label: c Interest rate for new principal amounts
children.text: As of , the unpaid balance on the new principal amount established for an old capital investment under subsection (b) bears interest annually at the Treasury rate for the old capital investment until the earlier of the date that the new principal amount is repaid or the repayment date for the new principal amount.October 1, 1996

children.heading: Repayment dates
children.label: d Repayment dates
children.text: As of , the repayment date for the new principal amount established for an old capital investment under subsection (b) is no earlier than the repayment date for the old capital investment assumed in subsection (b)(3)(A).October 1, 1996

children.heading: Prepayment limitations
children.label: e Prepayment limitations
children.text: During the period , through , the total new principal amounts of old capital investments, as established under subsection (b), that the Administrator may pay before their respective repayment dates shall not exceed $100,000,000.October 1, 1996September 30, 2001

children.heading: Interest rates for new capital investments during construction
children.label: f Interest rates for new capital investments during construction
A
children.text: construction expenditures that were made from the date construction commenced through the end of the fiscal year, and

children.label: B
children.text: accrued interest during construction.

children.heading: Payment
children.label: 2 Payment
children.text: The Administrator is not required to pay, during construction of the project, facility, or separable unit or feature, the interest calculated, accrued, and capitalized under subsection (f)(1).

children.heading: One-year rate
children.label: 3 One-year rate
children.text: For the purposes of this section, “one-year rate” for a fiscal year means a rate determined by the Secretary of the Treasury, taking into consideration prevailing market yields, during the month preceding the beginning of the fiscal year, on outstanding interest-bearing obligations of the United States with periods to maturity of approximately one year.

children.heading: Interest rates for new capital investments
children.label: g Interest rates for new capital investments
children.text: The unpaid balance on the principal amount of a new capital investment bears interest at the Treasury rate for the new capital investment from the date the related project, facility, or separable unit or feature is placed in service until the earlier of the date the new capital investment is repaid or the repayment date for the new capital investment.

children.label: A
children.text: the principal amount of an old capital investment shall be no greater than the new principal amount established under subsection (b);

children.label: B
children.text: the interest rate applicable to the unpaid balance of the new principal amount of an old capital investment shall be no greater than the interest rate established under subsection (c);

children.label: C
children.text: any payment of principal of an old capital investment shall reduce the outstanding principal balance of the old capital investment in the amount of the payment at the time the payment is tendered; and

children.label: D
children.text: any payment of interest on the unpaid balance of the new principal amount of an old capital investment shall be a credit against the appropriate interest account in the amount of the payment at the time the payment is tendered;

apart from charges necessary to repay the new principal amount of an old capital investment as established under subsection (b) and to pay the interest on the principal amount under subsection (c), no amount may be charged for return to the United States Treasury as repayment for or return on an old capital investment, whether by way of rate, rent, lease payment, assessment, user charge, or any other fee;

amounts provided under shall be available to pay, and shall be the sole source for payment of, a judgment against or settlement by the Administrator or the United States on a claim for a breach of the contract provisions required by this Part; andsection 1304 of title 311So in original. Probably should be “section;” or “section”.1

children.label: A
children.text: preclude the Administrator from recovering, through rates or other means, any tax that is generally imposed on electric utilities in the United States, or

children.label: i
children.text: allocate costs and benefits, including but not limited to fish and wildlife costs, to rates or resources, or

children.label: ii
children.text: design rates.

children.heading: Repayment
children.label: 1 Repayment
children.text: This section does not affect the obligation of the Administrator to repay the principal associated with each capital investment, and to pay interest on the principal, only from the “Administrator’s net proceeds,” as defined in .section 838k(b) of this title

children.heading: Payment of capital investment
children.label: 2 Payment of capital investment
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (e), this section does not affect the authority of the Administrator to pay all or a portion of the principal amount associated with a capital investment before the repayment date for the principal amount.
